description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: tests and docs. In the tests stage add a python_tests job that uses the python:3.6.5-alpine image, runs "apk --no-cache add git", then "pip install nose coverage requests", then "pip install -r requirements.txt", then "nosetests", stores the contents of the cover/* directory as artifacts that expire in 1 week, and runs on all branches except the dissertation branch. In the docs stage add a docs-dissertation job that uses the aergus/latex image, runs only on the dissertation branch, executes "cd dissertation" followed by "latexmk -pdf", and publishes all PDF and log files from dissertation/*.pdf and dissertation/*.log as artifacts that expire in 1 week. Also in the docs stage add a python_docs job that uses the python:3.6.5-alpine image, runs only on the master branch and tags, executes "apk --no-cache add make", "apk --no-cache add git", "pip install sphinx sphinx_rtd_theme requests", "pip install -r requirements.txt", "cd docs", "make html", and publishes the generated HTML files from docs/_build/html/* as artifacts that expire in 1 week.
